credentials.label: Credentials (displayed)
credentials.description: Separate your Credentials by spaces or commas - however you'd like them to appear on your Profile/Listing page

certifying-body.label: Certifying Body (displayed)
certifying-body.description: Your current certifying body(ies): include Organization name, website, phone number, and contact name (where possible)

region.label: Region (displayed)
region.description: Select from choices available in this field

complete-address.label: Enter your Clinic/Office Complete Address (displayed)
complete-address.description: Complete address as you would like it to appear on your Profile/Listing (e.g. Unit #, Street, City, Prov/State, PCode/Zipcode, Country).

job_location.label: Google Maps Street Address (displayed on map)
job_location.description: This field is specifically for placing GoogleMaps pins. Start entering your address and select the most appropriate option from Google's list. (NOTE: Your suite # will likely not show here.)

job_email.label: Contact Email (displayed)
job_email.description: Your preferred email for clients/patients to contact you.

job_phone.label: Phone Number (displayed)
job_phone.description: Best phone number for clients/patients to reach you (e.g. +1.604.111.2222)

job_website.label: Website (displayed)
job_website.description: Copy and paste your actual website address from a browser (e.g. https://myndmyself.com or https://www.myndmyself.com/)

my-liability-insurance-provider-is.label: Liability Insurance Provider (for Mynd Myself Admin)
my-liability-insurance-provider-is.placeholder: Your Insurance Provider, Policy Number, Expiry date of policy
my-liability-insurance-provider-is.description: Provider, Policy Number, Expiry date of policy

health-expert-panel.label: Are you interested in participating in Mynd Myself's Zoom Health Expert Panels? (for Mynd Myself Admin)

advertising.label: Are you interested in purchasing ad space on the Mynd Myself website? (for Mynd Myself Admin)

healthcare-approach.label: Healthcare Approach(es) (displayed)
healthcare-approach.description: Select all Healthcare Approaches available in this section that you use in your treatments

health-issue.label: Top Health Issues you treat (displayed)
health-issue.description: Select from the 'high level' list of categories - all that are appropriate. (NOTE: We will be continuing to add to this list on an ongoing basis, so whenever you edit your profile, please check back to this section.)

accessibility.label: Accessibility (displayed)
accessibility.description: Each line reads from left column to right column. Select all options that you offer.

other.label: Other (for Mynd Myself Admin)
other.description: Feel free to suggest any Health Care Approach, Health Issue, or Accessibility options that we haven't yet included here. This is a 'living' and expanding project.

job_description.label: Description of your Healthcare Approach(es)  (displayed)
job_description.description: Describe what you do and what Healthcare Approaches/Modalities you use. This is likely the first content text that most visitors to your Profile/Listing will read. We recommend that you take a bit of time with this one!

the-why.label: The Why (displayed)
the-why.description: The DEEP WHY of what you do. We believe this is vitally important and therefore, we recommend that you also take a bit of time with this one!

your-focus.label: Your Focus(es) (displayed)
your-focus.description: Although we are aware that you cannot use the word 'specialties', this is the place to share those things that are the focus of your primary expertise, interest, and practice.

idea.label: Your ideal patients/clients (displayed)
idea.description: Describe some characteristics of the people and the Health Issues you most like to work with.

awards-and-honours.label: Awards / Honours (displayed)
awards-and-honours.description: Any awards or honours that you have received in your field or from the community, etc.

your-collaborations.label: Collaborations (displayed)
your-collaborations.description: My philosophy of collaboration with other Practitioners/Health Care Approaches/Modalities. You can also describe some/noteworthy collaborations you are (or have been) involved with.

your-influences.label: Your Influences (displayed)
your-influences.description: People and fields of study you have been influenced/inspired by.

formal-bio.label: Your formal bio (for Mynd Myself Admin)

key-information-for-your-listing.label: 5. Key Information and Images for your Listing/Profile

job_cover.label: Top Banner Image (displayed)
job_cover.description: Upload the image that will appear at the top of your Profile/Listing page.

job_logo.label: Headshot - appearing in the top banner (displayed)
job_logo.placeholder: please upload a square headshot image
job_logo.description: Upload a square headshot image. It will appear on the top banner as well as on the GoogleMaps pin of your location on the map

links.label: Social Networks (displayed)
links.description: Ad your Facebook, Instagram, YouTube, Twitter, etc. links

price.label: Price (displayed)
price.description: Typical Initial Appointment $   ; Typical Follow-up Appointment $

work_hours.label: Work Hours (displayed)
work_hours.description: Select your options from the menu in this section. Also type your city in the gray field "Add Hours" to select your time zone.

job_gallery.label: Gallery Images of you and your practice (displayed)
job_gallery.description: Upload images of you and your practice that you would like to share in the public gallery on your Profile/Listing page.

content.label: 'Links' to published content or 'Copy & Paste text' to share as a Blog Post(s) in Mynd Myself's Community Blog section
content.description: In this section below, insert links (one line per link) to articles, publications, blogs, white papers, etc. that you've already published elsewhere and want to post with Mynd Myself as well. You can also copy and paste Titles and Text for articles/blogs/etc. that have been completed but not yet published, and we will format them into blogposts to share in Mynd Myself's blogs/resources section. Feel free to upload any separate but related images (if they are not already part of the document) in the section "Uploadable Content" immediately below this one.

content-upload.label: Uploadable Content (including images related to articles above)
content-upload.description: If applicable, you can upload images (jpeg, png), pdfs, and formatted word docs here that are either stand-alone or relate to any information submitted in the section "'Links' to..." immediately above this one.

i-offer-the-following-types-of-sessions.label: I offer the following types of sessions: (displayed)
i-offer-the-following-types-of-sessions.description: Select which apply to you from the menu in this section.

initial-appointment.label: An initial appointment is approximately (how long): (displayed)
initial-appointment.description: If this is not applicable, please enter n/a in this field

follow-up-appointments.label: Follow-up appointments are approximately (how long): (displayed)
follow-up-appointments.description: If this is not applicable, please enter n/a in this field

3rd-party-insurance.label: Private 3rd party insurance providers/claims I accept are (displayed)
3rd-party-insurance.description: If you're listing them, please list them one per line in a column.

online-booking.label: I use an online booking service  (displayed)
online-booking.description: Copy and paste a link including https://

confidentiality.label: The program I currently use to ensure confidentiality of online treatment is (For Mynd Myself Admin)

waiting-list.label: Do you have a waiting list? (for Mynd Myself Admin)
waiting-list.description: Indicate yes or no. If yes, also include how long is the wait time for new patients to see you?

offerings.label: 8.  Offerings /  Workshops / Courses - add one workshop/course/offering per tab below (include links) (displayed)

additional-services.label: Additional Services and Sales you offer: (for Mynd Myself Admin)

services.label: Additional Services / Sales (displayed)
services.description: Any additional products or services you offer that you want people to know about

associations.label: I belong to the following Association(s) (for Mynd Myself Admin)

recent-patient-testimonials.label: Please provide 3-5 recent patient testimonials (for Mynd Myself Admin)
recent-patient-testimonials.description: 3-5 patients from within last 6-8 months - include their testimonial, name, and title (if appropriate)

peer-references.label: Please provide 2 Peer References (for Mynd Myself Admin)
peer-references.description: 2 peer references from within last 6-8 months  - include their testimonial, name, and title

crimimal-records-check.label: Crimimal Records Check (for Mynd Myself Admin)
crimimal-records-check.description: Please upload your confirmed clean criminal records check asap

a-little-more-about-me.label: 10.  For Mynd Myself office use only

criminal-records-check-received.label: Criminal Records Check received on this date (for Mynd Myself Admin)

date-of-interview.label: DATE of Interview/First Podcast  (for Mynd Myself Admin)

job_video_url.label: Interview URL (for Mynd Myself Admin)
job_video_url.description: Nothing for you, as a Practitioner, to enter here

podcast-titles-done-with-this-practition.label: Podcast Titles done with this Practitioner  (for Mynd Myself Admin)

related_listing.label: Related Listing (for Mynd Myself Admin)
related_listing.placeholder: for multiple practitioners at a practice
related_listing.description: Nothing for you, as a Practitioner, to enter here

advertising-notes.label: Advertising Notes  (for Mynd Myself Admin)
advertising-notes.description: Creatives, start and end dates etc

save-your-work-now.label: SAVE YOUR WORK OFTEN - you may return and edit any time

sidebar.title: Health Issues I Can Help You With
